chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-489 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 2812/2019 For orders on M.A. 2813/2019 For hearing of main case 26.05.2022 The petitioner, who is only a Cable Operator under the license issued by respondent No.2, has filed this petition seeking directions against respondents No.2, 3, 5 & 6 to undo the change of the management illegally made against the license of M/s TV Nation Private Limited. We have perused the record. It appears that petitioner in fact has no nexus with M/s TV Nation Private Limited and inside mechanism within PEMRA Laws which may deal with the change in the management of any licensee and hence the petitioner may exhaust appropriate remedy under the PEMRA Laws by moving application if it is so required and desired. Petition being misconceived is liable to be dismissed on this count along. However, since the petitioner is not in attendance we are inclined to dismiss it for non-prosecution JUDGE JUDGE
